# Okazaki

> Github Automation Package in Python Powered By AI.

## Note

This Project is Read Only and a Part of Ropen Core.

classes.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.Label
documentation: Represents a label for categorizing issues or pull requests.

classes.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.AutoTriageRule
documentation: Defines a rule for automatic issue triaging.

classes.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.AutoTriageConfig
documentation: Configuration for the auto-triage plugin.

classes.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.StaleConfig
documentation: Configuration for the stale plugin.

classes.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.ConfigParser

methods.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.ConfigParser.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the ConfigParser with configuration data.

Args:
    configs (Dict): A dictionary containing the configuration data.

methods.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.ConfigParser.parse
documentation:
Parse the entire configuration.

Returns:
    Dict: A dictionary containing the parsed configuration.

methods.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.ConfigParser.parse_labels
documentation:
Parse the labels configuration.

Args:
    label_data (List[dict]): A list of dictionaries, each representing a label.

Returns:
    List[Label]: A list of Label objects.

methods.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.ConfigParser.parse_plugins
documentation:
Parse the plugins configuration.

Args:
    plugins_data (Dict): A dictionary containing plugin configurations.

Returns:
    Dict: A dictionary of parsed plugin configurations.

methods.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.ConfigParser.parse_auto_triage
documentation:
Parse the auto-triage plugin configuration.

Args:
    auto_triage_data (Dict): A dictionary containing auto-triage configuration.

Returns:
    AutoTriageConfig: An object representing the parsed auto-triage configuration.

methods.name: okazaki.config.config_parser.ConfigParser.parse_stale
documentation:
Parse the stale plugin configuration.

Args:
    stale_data (Dict): A dictionary containing stale plugin configuration.

Returns:
    StaleConfig: An object representing the parsed stale configuration.
A class for parsing and processing configuration data for GitHub issue management.

methods.name: okazaki.api.app.App.__init__
documentation: Initializes the App class with the given parameters.

methods.name: okazaki.api.app.App.init
documentation:
Initializes the GitHub client using the GitHub App authentication.
Reads the private key from the specified file path and creates an
authenticated GitHub client.

methods.name: okazaki.api.app.App.get_client
documentation: Returns the initialized GitHub client.

methods.name: okazaki.api.app.App.get_logger
documentation: Returns the logger instance.

The `App` class is responsible for initializing a GitHub client using
GitHub App authentication.

methods.name: okazaki.api.issue.Issue.__init__

documentation: Retrieves a specific issue by its number.

methods.name: okazaki.api.issue.Issue.create_issue
documentation: Creates a new issue in the specified repository.

methods.name: okazaki.api.issue.Issue.get_labels
documentation: Retrieves specific labels by their names.

methods.name: okazaki.api.issue.Issue.close_issue
documentation: Closes a specific issue by its number.

documentation: Reopens a specific issue by its number.

documentation: Edits an existing issue.

documentation: Adds a comment to a specific issue.

documentation: Retrieves comments from a specific issue.

methods.name: okazaki.api.issue.Issue.add_labels
documentation: Adds labels to a specific issue.

documentation: Removes a label from a specific issue.

methods.name: okazaki.api.issue.Issue.get_events
documentation: Retrieves events from a specific issue.

methods.name: okazaki.api.issue.Issue.search_issues
documentation: Searches for issues based on a query.

methods.name: okazaki.api.client.Client._get

documentation: Perform a POST request to the specified URL.

methods.name: okazaki.api.client.Client._put
documentation: Perform a PUT request to the specified URL.

methods.name: okazaki.api.client.Client._patch

methods.name: okazaki.api.client.Client._delete

methods.name: okazaki.api.client.Client._is_success

methods.name: okazaki.api.client.Client._get_url

methods.name: okazaki.api.client.Client._get_headers
